title: rubus psilocaulis
intro: Rubus psilocaulis, also known as the dwarf raspberry or creeping raspberry, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family native to the mountainous regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus psilocaulis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems.
